code:
def check_balance(expression):
    stack = []
    mapping = {")": "(", "}": "{", "]": "["}
    
    for char in expression:
        if char in mapping.values():  # Açılış parantezi
            stack.append(char)
        elif char in mapping:  # Kapanış parantezi
            if not stack:
                return False  # Stack boşken kapanış parantezi geldi
            top_element = stack.pop()
            if mapping[char] != top_element:
                return False  # Eşleşmeyen parantez
    
    return not stack  # Tüm parantezler eşleştiyse stack boş olmalı

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Test durumları
    print(check_balance("()[]{}"))           # True
    print(check_balance("([{}])"))           # True
    print(check_balance("{[()()]}"))         # True
    print(check_balance("({[})"))            # False
    print(check_balance("(()"))              # False
    print(check_balance("())"))              # False
    print(check_balance(""))                 # True
    print(check_balance("{"))                # False
    print(check_balance("}"))                # False
    print(check_balance("{[()]}"))           # True
    print(check_balance("{[()]"))            # False
    print(check_balance("}{"))               # False
    print(check_balance("a(b[c]d)e"))        # True (non-parentheses ignored, though typically they are not part of the check)
prompt: Stack kullanarak parantez dengeleme kontrol et.
